query: DELETE s1 FROM students s1 INNER JOIN students s2 WHERE s1.id > s2.id AND s1.fullName = s2.fullName AND s1.grade = s2.grade;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35xPkBa73Yuiy4A.root --database kcQuJzmxhkjxjyE5pHTEwG --execute DELETE s1 FROM students s1 INNER JOIN students s2 WHERE s1.id > s2.id AND s1.fullName = s2.fullName AND s1.grade = s2.grade;
